# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

Resources: 
    # Subnets for microservices architecture with multiple Availability Zones included (for better data-isolation and high availability)  
     VPCSubnet1AZ: []        
     VPCSubnet2AZ: []         
     ...                     
     
Outputs :                         
        InternetGatewayID: 
            Description "The ID of the internet gateway created"   
            Export: yes                            # To allow other AWS services to access resources in this vpc  
        
       VPCSecurityGroup1AZ256BucketEBSLogsKMSMasterKeyRotation-Exports : 
           Description "The ID of the security group created for microservice on subnet A and B"    #This allows only specific services to access each other.  
        
       VPCSecurityGroup1AZ256BucketEBSLogsKMSMasterKeyRotation-Export: yes  # To allow rotation key KMSEncryption at rest in the bucket logs (reducing costs)
